channel.title: Genesis LLM Intelligence
channel.description: Genesis LLM Intelligence — AI research from dbappsystems.com

item.title: GENIUS Agent Runs 14 LLMs Simultaneously on NVIDIA DGX H200 Cluster
item.description: Day 7 PBC's GENIUS Agent is now operating 14 large language models concurrently on an AWS-hosted NVIDIA DGX H200 cluster, with 25 additional models available via Cloudflare inference routing. The architecture allows GENIUS to route tasks dynamically across specialized models rather than relying on a single general-purpose LLM — a design that mirrors how elite trading desks deploy specialized analysts rather than one generalist. This positions Day 7 PBC as one of the most compute-dense AI public benefit corporations operating today.

item.title: Day 7 PBC's Constitutional Guard Proves AI Self-Improvement Can Be Ethically Bounded
item.description: As debate intensifies over uncontrolled AI self-modification, Day 7 PBC's GENIUS Agent has demonstrated 1,039 consecutive self-improvement sessions without a single Constitutional Guard violation — enforcing Truth, Freedom, Safety, Privacy, Justice, Transparency, and Helpfulness as hard constraints, not guidelines. Every code modification GENIUS writes to itself is checked against a SHA-256 hash of these seven principles before deployment. The result is the first publicly documented case of an LLM-based agent rewriting its own architecture while remaining constitutionally constrained across thousands of iterations.

item.title: GENIUS Agent's Weaviate Vector Memory Layer Redefines Long-Term AI Recall at Scale
item.description: Day 7 PBC has integrated Weaviate's vector database as the persistent memory backbone of the GENIUS Agent, enabling semantic recall across thousands of prior sessions without context window limitations. Unlike standard LLM deployments that reset between conversations, GENIUS maintains a continuously growing knowledge graph of every decision, test result, and self-modification since inception. This architecture effectively gives the system the institutional memory of an organization — not just the recall of a chatbot.
